page.title: Jet Ski Hire Marbella | Boat Rental Marbella

data.meta_description: Book jet ski hire Marbella from Puerto Banús. Sea-Doo GTX 3-seater from €749/2h. Skipper, drinks & VAT included. WhatsApp for availability.
data.summary: Jet ski hire in Marbella departs from Puerto Banús aboard a Sea-Doo GTX, with pricing starting at €749 for 2 hours. All charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance and VAT.
key_facts: Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski: 3.4m, 3 pax, departs Puerto Banús.
Price: €749 for 2 hours, €2,299 for 8 hours (skipper, drinks, VAT included).
Every charter includes licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, Spanish IVA (21%).
Maximum 3 passengers per jet ski (including skipper).
All jet skis depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella.
Book via WhatsApp for availability and longer durations.
Combine with a boat charter for a full day on the water.

faq.q: Do I need a licence to hire a jet ski in Marbella?
faq.a: No, you don’t need a licence. Our jet ski hire includes a licensed skipper who will operate the jet ski. You can ride as a passenger or, if you have experience, the skipper may let you take the controls under supervision.

faq.q: How many people can ride on one jet ski?
faq.a: The Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski can carry up to 3 people (including the skipper). That means you and up to two friends or family members can enjoy the ride together.

faq.q: What is included in the jet ski hire price?
faq.a: The price includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden extras.

faq.q: Where do jet skis depart from in Marbella?
faq.a: All jet skis depart from Puerto Banús, the main marina in Marbella. You’ll meet the skipper at the dock, and after a safety briefing, you’ll head out into the bay.

faq.q: Can I combine a jet ski hire with a boat charter?
faq.a: Yes, you can. Many guests book a boat charter and add a jet ski for extra fun. For example, the Tier B boats (Mangusta 80) include a free jet ski for the charter duration. Contact us via WhatsApp to arrange a combined experience.

faq.q: What is the minimum age to ride a jet ski?
faq.a: There is no strict minimum age, but all passengers must be able to wear a life jacket comfortably. Children under 12 are usually not recommended due to safety concerns. Please check with us via WhatsApp for specific cases.

faq.q: Can I book a jet ski for longer than 2 hours?
faq.a: Yes, our standard pricing covers 2 hours (€749) up to 8 hours (€2,299). For longer durations or custom timings, contact us via WhatsApp. We can arrange half-day or full-day jet ski hire.

faq.q: What should I wear for jet ski hire in Marbella?
faq.a: Wear swimwear, a t-shirt or rash guard, sunscreen (SPF 50+), and sunglasses with a strap. You’ll get wet, so bring a towel and a change of clothes. We provide life jackets and safety equipment.

data.body_html:
Jet ski hire in Marbella offers a fast, fun way to explore the Costa del Sol coastline. Our Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski departs from Puerto Banús and can carry up to three people. Prices start at €749 for 2 hours, including a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT. No licence needed — just turn up and ride.

Why choose our jet ski hire in Marbella?

We operate from Puerto Banús, the most famous marina on the Costa del Sol. Our Sea-Doo GTX is a 3.4-metre, 3-passenger jet ski that delivers a smooth, powerful ride. Every hire includes a licensed skipper, so you can relax or take the controls under supervision. Fuel, insurance, and Spanish IVA (21%) are all included — no surprises at the end.

Pricing and duration

Our jet ski hire pricing is straightforward:

  • 2 hours: €749
  • 4 hours: €1,299
  • 8 hours: €2,299

All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT. For custom durations or multi-day hire, contact us via WhatsApp.

What’s included in your jet ski hire?

Every jet ski charter includes:

  • Licensed skipper
  • Fuel
  • Water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava
  • Light snacks
  • Insurance and safety equipment
  • Spanish IVA (21%)

No hidden fees. Just show up at Puerto Banús and enjoy.

Where will we ride?

Your skipper will take you along the Marbella coastline, past the Golden Mile, Cabopino, and possibly as far as Estepona or Sotogrande, depending on the duration. You’ll see the Sierra Blanca mountains, La Concha peak, and the luxury yachts of Puerto Banús. Short trips often head to Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés for a swim stop.

Combine jet ski hire with a boat charter

If you want more space and amenities, consider booking a boat charter. Our Tier B boats (Mangusta 80, Mangusta 80 Grey, Mangusta 80 White) include a free jet ski for the charter duration. You can also add a jet ski to any other boat hire. Browse our full fleet and contact us via WhatsApp to build your perfect day on the water.

How to book

Booking is simple: send us a WhatsApp message with your preferred date, duration, and number of passengers. We’ll confirm availability and send you a booking link. Payment is secure via bank transfer or card. We recommend booking at least 48 hours in advance, especially during July and August.

Frequently asked questions

Do I need a licence to hire a jet ski in Marbella?

No, you don’t need a licence. Our jet ski hire includes a licensed skipper who will operate the jet ski. You can ride as a passenger or, if you have experience, the skipper may let you take the controls under supervision.

How many people can ride on one jet ski?

The Sea-Doo GTX Jet Ski can carry up to 3 people (including the skipper). That means you and up to two friends or family members can enjoy the ride together.

What is included in the jet ski hire price?

The price includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden extras.

Where do jet skis depart from in Marbella?

All jet skis depart from Puerto Banús, the main marina in Marbella. You’ll meet the skipper at the dock, and after a safety briefing, you’ll head out into the bay.

Can I combine a jet ski hire with a boat charter?

Yes, you can. Many guests book a boat charter and add a jet ski for extra fun. For example, the Tier B boats (Mangusta 80) include a free jet ski for the charter duration. Contact us via WhatsApp to arrange a combined experience.

What is the minimum age to ride a jet ski?

There is no strict minimum age, but all passengers must be able to wear a life jacket comfortably. Children under 12 are usually not recommended due to safety concerns. Please check with us via WhatsApp for specific cases.

Can I book a jet ski for longer than 2 hours?

Yes, our standard pricing covers 2 hours (€749) up to 8 hours (€2,299). For longer durations or custom timings, contact us via WhatsApp. We can arrange half-day or full-day jet ski hire.

What should I wear for jet ski hire in Marbella?

Wear swimwear, a t-shirt or rash guard, sunscreen (SPF 50+), and sunglasses with a strap. You’ll get wet, so bring a towel and a change of clothes. We provide life jackets and safety equipment.
